entries.definition:
sh–f–h lip; to speak face to face; (of food and water) to be craved; (of property) to be sought after; to consume. Of this root, only شَفَتَيْنِ shafatayn occurs once in the Qurʾan.
شَفَتَيْنِ shafatayn [dual n.] two lips (90:8–9) أَلَمْ نَجْعَلْ لَهُ عَيْنَيْنِ وَلِسَانًا وَشَفَتَيْنِ did We not give him two eyes, a tongue, and two lips?
entries.definition_english:
sh–f–h lip; to speak face to face; (of food and water) to be craved; (of property) to be sought after; to consume. Of this root, only شَفَتَيْنِ shafatayn occurs once in the Qurʾan.
شَفَتَيْنِ shafatayn [dual n.] two lips (90:8–9) أَلَمْ نَجْعَلْ لَهُ عَيْنَيْنِ وَلِسَانًا وَشَفَتَيْنِ did We not give him two eyes, a tongue, and two lips?
